This Data Processing Addendum is entered by Shanhai Meridian Instruments Co., Ltd. (USCC 92Z3AL570091XYT3M9, an issuer on the Linjiang Equity Exchange) as controller and Qiqi Cloud Services (Beitan) Ltd. (USCC 88Q9BK420011MN0P5K) as processor under the PIPL, CSL, and DSL.
Personal information has the meaning under PIPL, sensitive PI includes minors under 14, and “inside information” means non-public material information under the Securities Law applicable to the issuer prior to disclosure.
Processing purposes include employment administration, insider list maintenance, device fleet management, payroll and equity grant workflows for the issuer.
For example, Mr. Qiu Ren, born 1990-07-12, works as Compliance Officer at Shanhai Meridian (employee ID SMI-PRC-04421) at Unit 18A, Tower B, Jinghe Tech Park, Beitan New District, using NanshiPhone X2 IMEI 993001001002003, session SR-BTN-2026-0605-77, with corporate email qiu.ren@meridian.example.cn and salary account at Yunhai Rural Bank ending 4821.
To verify and audit insider access, we store only masked resident ID fragments (e.g., 99070119900712****) and device nicknames linked to corporate accounts, applying data minimization.
Data subjects may submit access, correction, deletion, and portability requests via privacy@qiqicloud.example.cn or https://privacy.shanhai-meridian.example.cn/dsar, and we may request name, contact channel, and the last four digits of resident ID or employee number to verify identity within 15 working days.
Cross-border transfers for backup to the Qiqi Cloud Viridia region occur under the PRC Standard Contract for outbound transfers, with security assessments coordinated by the Beitan Municipal Cyberspace Bureau and records kept for inspection.
MNPI related to the issuer (e.g., draft earnings or undisclosed option plans) is segregated, disclosed on a need-to-know basis only, and subject to trading blackout windows and pre-clearance tokens issued through the “Nezha v3.2” insider module.
Retention is as follows: employee records 10 years from termination, access logs 6 months, device logs 6 months, payroll slips 5 years, insider lists until the relevant information is publicly disclosed plus 5 years, after which irreversible anonymization or deletion is applied.
We implement encryption in transit and at rest, role-based access, monthly DLP scans, and we do not collect biometric templates or precise geolocation for these workflows.
Statistics such as age band 30–39, a generic job title like “analyst”, or an unspecified province such as Jiangbei are used for reporting and do not identify any natural person on their own.
Audit trails may show an unlinked DOB 1984-01-03, a device model “HuanghePad-10” without serial, or a VPN region “Liangnan” with an account tail ****1133, none of which are sufficient to identify an individual absent linkage.
Sub-processors include Oceanview Analytics Pte. (registration OA-2020-7781) for usage metrics and Xiangyun Payroll Tech (Hengdao) Ltd. (USCC 70PLNQ00992TRX5V6H) for payroll, each bound by onward transfer restrictions and Standard Contracts.
Contact Ms. Zhao Lanying, Data Protection Officer, at dpo@shanhai-meridian.example.cn or +86-09-7788-2210; unresolved complaints may be filed with the Huaxia Securities Oversight Office or the Beitan Data Protection Mediation Center.
This note does not alter statutory obligations and will be amended upon changes to implementing measures; a printed copy in Chinese prevails in case of discrepancy.
